SEO_DESCRIPTION: Mauro Corrales: Sr QA Automation and development. Five-plus years testing backend, frontend, mobile, and performance; CI/CD and frameworks. Side full-stack projects.

ABOUT_SECTION.TITLE: About me
ABOUT_SECTION.DESCRIPTION_1: I'm a developer focused on building solid, scalable digital products. I work proactively, understanding needs to turn ideas into concrete solutions.
ABOUT_SECTION.DESCRIPTION_2: With more than 6 years of experience in IT, I specialize in Sr QA Automation, designing automation solutions and tooling that improve quality and process efficiency.

PROJECTS.name: Rinde+
PROJECTS.description: Multi-currency personal finance platform with monthly dashboards and projections. I implemented scenario-based visualizations, integrations with pricing and inflation APIs, and a JWT-secured backend to support clear, data-driven financial decisions.

PROJECTS.name: AFS
PROJECTS.description: Application to manage clients, installations, and budgets with per-client traceability. I built an end-to-end operational flow with PDF generation, a serverless API on Vercel, and Supabase persistence to reduce manual work and improve process control.

PROJECTS.name: Digital invitation
PROJECTS.description: Interactive digital invitation with animations, photo carousel, autoplay music, trivia mini-game, and redirects to Calendar, Maps, and Form.
